name: Mysticism
description:
Enhances Mysticism as a mana recovery and adventure-map momentum skill.

Mysticism keeps the Horn of the Abyss daily spell point regeneration and adds Mystic Momentum. After successfully casting selected adventure-map control spells, the hero gains additional movement on the next day, once per supported spell per day.

## Skill Effects

* **Basic Mysticism:** regenerates 10% of maximum spell points per day, minimum 5; Mystic Momentum bonuses for Dimension Door, Water Walk, Summon Boat, and Scuttle Boat
* **Advanced Mysticism:** regenerates 20% of maximum spell points per day, minimum 10; adds Mystic Momentum bonuses for Fly and Town Portal, and improves all supported control spell bonuses
* **Expert Mysticism:** regenerates 30% of maximum spell points per day, minimum 15; further improves all Mystic Momentum bonuses

## Supported Mystic Momentum Spells

* **Basic:** Dimension Door, Water Walk, Summon Boat, Scuttle Boat
* **Advanced and Expert:** Fly, Town Portal, Dimension Door, Water Walk, Summon Boat, Scuttle Boat

## Specialist Interaction

Mysticism specialties increase only the spell point regeneration with hero level, and do not increase Mystic Momentum movement bonuses.

## Implementation Note

Mystic Momentum uses supporting spell markers on the affected adventure-map control spells. The movement bonus is granted on the next day after a successful cast and is limited to once per supported spell per day.
author: bew_
